description:
Verso: Legal fragment in what looks like the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli. Mentions [...] b. Bishāra, Abū l-Ḥusayn, and [...] b. Shemuʾel ha-Kohen. 

Recto: Legal fragment in what looks like the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Mentions [...] ha-Qehilot b. Seʿadʾel Rosh [...] and Mevorakh b. Yeshuʿa.

Some of the same people are mentioned in T-S Misc.28.1 (PGPID 23387).

Cf. T-S AS 145.333 (PGPID 16305) for fragments containing the hand of both Hillel and Ḥalfon.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
